words.definition: natural charm and ability to attract people, especially romantically. if you got it, you got it. can't be taught, only unlocked.
words.example: bro walked in and immediately had the whole room — man's got unspoken rizz fr
words.momSays: RIZZ-oh? Is that a new pasta brand?

words.definition: being delusional but make it a personality trait. manifesting something so hard reality starts to bend. delulu is the solulu bestie.
words.example: she genuinely thinks he'll text back after 3 weeks of silence. the delulu is the solulu bestie
words.momSays: De-LOO-loo? Isn't that a Teletubbies character?

words.definition: when someone absolutely kills it. they ate and left no crumbs. served looks, served talent, served everything.
words.example: she showed up to the meeting in a power suit and closed the deal — SLAY 💅✨
words.momSays: Slay? Like... with a sword? Should I be worried?

words.definition: no lie, for real, deadass serious. when you say no cap you're swearing on everything that you're telling the truth.
words.example: no cap that was the best concert I've ever been to, I literally ascended 🫡
words.momSays: No cap? But you're wearing a hat right now, sweetie!

words.definition: when something is SO good it makes you wanna call your grandma. usually about food but honestly anything elite.
words.example: bro these tacos are BUSSIN bussin, I need the recipe expeditiously 🌮🔥
words.usageWarning: giving 2021 energy ⚠️ still valid for food tho
words.momSays: BUSS-in? Like a school bus?

words.definition: when someone absolutely nails what they were supposed to do. they came, they saw, they ATE. no notes needed.
words.example: Zendaya at the Met Gala? girl UNDERSTOOD THE ASSIGNMENT every single year 💅
words.momSays: Of course I understand! I went to school too!

words.definition: the relationship limbo where you're more than friends but less than dating. no labels, no commitment, just vibes and existential dread.
words.example: we've been in a situationship for 8 months and he still introduces me as 'someone I know' 😭
words.momSays: Sitchy-ation-ship? Back in my day we just called it 'complicated'!

words.definition: living life like you're the protagonist of a movie. main character energy means the world revolves around you (affectionate).
words.example: put on my airpods, played my soundtrack, walked through the rain — full main character moment 🎬
words.momSays: Main character? In what movie? Are you acting now?

words.definition: someone who moves through life on autopilot with zero original thoughts. just following the script like a video game background character.
words.example: he orders the same thing every day, walks the same route, says 'living the dream' — certified NPC behavior
words.momSays: NPC? Is that a new company? Like NBC?

words.definition: something you think about constantly and obsessively. everyone has a roman empire — that one thing that lives rent free.
words.example: asked my bf what his roman empire is and he said 'how do they get the ship in the bottle' 💀
words.momSays: The Roman Empire? I learned about that in history class!

words.definition: a phase of your life defined by a specific vibe or behavior. can be anything from villain era to healing era.
words.example: I'm in my villain era, I said no to plans and didn't even feel guilty about it
words.momSays: ERA? Like the laundry detergent?

words.definition: did something so perfectly there was nothing left to criticize. absolute flawless execution. devoured.
words.example: her presentation? ate and left no crumbs. the professor started clapping 👏
words.momSays: Ate what? Did you have lunch? There's leftovers in the fridge!

words.definition: describes the vibe or energy something is putting out. can be positive or negative depending on what it's giving.
words.example: that outfit? it's giving CEO energy. it's giving main character. it's giving EVERYTHING.
words.momSays: It's giving what? Finish your sentence!

words.definition: subtly, secretly, or to a moderate degree. the opposite of highkey. when you feel something but don't wanna be too loud about it.
words.example: lowkey obsessed with this new song but I don't wanna seem basic 😶
words.momSays: Low key? Like a piano key? Which one?

words.definition: the opposite of lowkey. openly, obviously, very much so. you're not hiding it AT ALL.
words.example: highkey need a vacation right now or I'm gonna lose it fr fr
words.momSays: High key? Like the top of the piano?

words.definition: having opinions that are bold, authentic, and unapologetically yourself regardless of what others think. the opposite of cringe.
words.example: she told her boss the meeting could've been an email — based queen 👑
words.momSays: Based on what exactly??

words.definition: mediocre, average, nothing special. not terrible but definitely not impressive. the most devastating insult in gen z vocabulary.
words.example: sorry but that movie was mid. the trailer was better than the whole film 🥱
words.momSays: Mid? Like the middle? The middle of what?

words.definition: a win. something good happened. can be used as a noun, adjective, or reaction. opposite of L.
words.example: got an A on the exam I didn't study for — massive W 🏆
words.momSays: W? Just the letter? Use your words!

words.definition: a loss. something bad or embarrassing happened. used as a noun or reaction. the opposite of W.
words.example: tripped in front of my crush in the hallway — biggest L of my life 💀
words.momSays: L? Like the letter L? What does that mean?

words.definition: when a reply gets more likes than the original post, meaning the original take was bad. ultimate social media humiliation.
words.example: he tweeted 'pizza is mid' and got ratioed into oblivion. as he should.
words.momSays: Ratio? Like in math class?

words.definition: suspicious or suspect. when something or someone seems off, sketchy, or not quite right. made mainstream by Among Us.
words.example: why is he being so nice all of a sudden? that's kinda sus ngl 🤨
words.momSays: SUSS? Like... a sussage? A sausage?

words.definition: when someone disappears from your life with zero explanation. no text back, no call, just vanished into the shadow realm.
words.example: he ghosted me after 3 months of talking every day... bro became casper 👻
words.momSays: Ghost-ing? Like being a ghost for Halloween?

words.definition: describing behavior or people that are harmful, manipulative, or emotionally destructive but somehow still attractive.
words.example: he's toxic but his jawline makes me forget about my standards 😩
words.momSays: Toxic? Like chemicals? Do I need to call poison control?

words.definition: when something or someone occupies your thoughts constantly without your permission. they're just living there and not paying.
words.example: that embarrassing thing I said in 2017 lives rent free in my head at 3am every night
words.momSays: Rent free? In this economy? Where??

words.definition: manipulating someone into questioning their own reality and sanity. making them think they're the crazy one when they're not.
words.example: he ate my leftovers and then said 'what leftovers?' — the gaslighting is insane
words.momSays: Gaslighting? Is there a gas leak? Should we leave the house?

words.definition: when someone deliberately keeps others from accessing or enjoying something. hoarding knowledge, places, music, etc.
words.example: she won't tell anyone where she got that jacket. the gatekeeping is REAL.
words.momSays: Gate keeping? Like a security guard?

words.definition: originally empowering, now used ironically for women doing questionable things with confidence. gaslight gatekeep girlboss.
words.example: she scammed three companies and started a podcast about it. girlboss behavior 💅
words.momSays: Girl boss? So you got a promotion? I'm so proud!

words.definition: an assessment of someone's energy and mood. can be wholesome or threatening depending on context.
words.example: random vibe check at 2am: are you thriving or just surviving? 🫠
words.momSays: Vibe check? Is that like a health checkup?

words.definition: when something has a uniquely powerful emotional impact depending on context or timing. same thing, different feeling.
words.example: mac and cheese at 3am after crying hits different and you can't convince me otherwise
words.momSays: Hits different? What's hitting you? Are you okay??

words.definition: something so funny it's metaphorically launching you into another dimension. you cannot handle it.
words.example: the way her cat just stared at the wall for 10 minutes straight is SENDING ME 😭💀
words.momSays: Sending you where? Do you need a ride?

words.definition: something is so funny you have metaphorically died from laughter. your soul has left the chat.
words.example: she really asked the teacher 'did you write this?' about Shakespeare. I'M DECEASED 💀⚰️
words.momSays: DECEASED?! Should I call 911??

words.definition: period but with emphasis. end of discussion. no debate. the t adds finality that regular period could never.
words.example: I'm the best in this class and that's on PERIODT. no notes.
words.momSays: Period-T? Is that a vitamin supplement?

words.definition: looking extremely good. usually about appearance — hair, outfit, body, makeup. everything is tight and right.
words.example: her edges? snatched. her lashes? snatched. her waist? SNATCHED. we have no choice but to stan 💅
words.momSays: Snatched? Like kidnapped?? Who got snatched??

words.definition: an extremely devoted fan. can be used as a verb (to stan) or noun (a stan). comes from the Eminem song.
words.example: I stan Beyoncé and I'm not apologizing for it. she IS the music industry.
words.momSays: Stan? That's your uncle's name! Are you visiting him?

words.definition: someone who does way too much for a person who won't do the same back. putting someone on a pedestal while getting nothing.
words.example: he drove 2 hours to bring her food and she left him on read. certified simp behavior 🤡
words.momSays: SIMP? Like... simple? You calling someone simple?

words.definition: caught red-handed with undeniable evidence. high definition proof of your wrongdoing. no excuses possible.
words.example: said he was 'busy' but we caught him in 4k at the mall with another girl 📸
words.momSays: 4K? Is that a new TV? We just bought a TV!

words.definition: someone whose career success is largely due to having famous or connected parents. talent is optional when your last name opens doors.
words.example: love how every new actor in Hollywood is somehow related to another actor. nepo baby industry 🎬
words.momSays: Nepo baby? Like a new baby? Who had a baby??

words.definition: go outside. disconnect from the internet. you've been online too long and it shows. nature awaits you bestie.
words.example: if you're arguing about fictional characters at 4am you need to touch grass immediately 🌱
words.momSays: Touch grass? I touch grass every time I mow the lawn!

words.definition: someone who spends so much time on the internet that their worldview is entirely shaped by it. they reference tweets in real life.
words.example: she said 'ratio' to her teacher out loud. chronically online doesn't even begin to cover it
words.momSays: Chronically online? Is that a medical condition?

words.definition: a moment so significant it permanently gets stored in your emotional database. from Inside Out but for real life.
words.example: the day my dog ran to greet me after a year away — instant core memory unlocked 🥺
words.momSays: Core memory? Like your computer's memory?

words.definition: a phase where you stop being nice and start prioritizing yourself. setting boundaries but make it dramatic.
words.example: I'm in my villain era. I said no to overtime, blocked my ex, and ate dessert first.
words.momSays: Villain? Are you becoming a bad person??

words.definition: a term of supreme admiration usually for a female celebrity or person who exudes power, grace, and dominance. she IS mother.
words.example: Lady Gaga at the Oscars? that is MOTHER. she doesn't try, she just IS.
words.momSays: Mother? Yes? Did you call me? What do you need?

words.definition: something or someone that is legendary, memorable, and sets the standard. beyond basic excellence.
words.example: 'get in loser, we're going shopping' — most iconic movie line of all time and I stand by that
words.momSays: Iconic? I know that word! Like the Eiffel Tower!

words.definition: a euphemism created to bypass content moderation. used to discuss serious topics without getting flagged by algorithms.
words.example: this math test is making me want to unalive my GPA 💀
words.usageWarning: used for algorithm evasion — topic can be sensitive
words.momSays: Un-alive? That's not even a word! You mean...?

words.definition: to show off something you're proud of. can be humble, hard, or weird. everyone's got a flex.
words.example: my flex is that I've never lost a game of rock paper scissors. undefeated champion 🏆
words.momSays: Flex? Like flexing your muscles? Go to the gym!

words.definition: when something (usually music or food) is incredibly good. it hits. it goes. it SLAPS.
words.example: this playlist slaps so hard I almost drove past my exit on the highway 🎵
words.momSays: Slaps? Violence is never the answer!

words.definition: extremely good, cool, or impressive. the OG compliment that never gets old.
words.example: that new album dropped and every single track is FIRE 🔥 zero skips
words.momSays: Fire? WHERE? Should I get the extinguisher??

words.definition: Greatest Of All Time status. the absolute peak. the GOAT but as an adjective.
words.example: Michael Jordan is GOATED and if you disagree we can't be friends 🐐
words.momSays: Goated? Like a goat? The animal?

words.definition: a sudden feeling of disgust or turn-off about someone you were attracted to. one small thing and it's OVER.
words.example: he chewed with his mouth open on the first date. instant ick. couldn't even finish dinner 🤢
words.momSays: ICK? Like 'icky'? You used to say that as a baby!

words.definition: not a red flag, not a green flag. just weird, quirky, questionable behavior that doesn't necessarily mean run.
words.example: he organizes his M&Ms by color before eating them. beige flag? beige flag.
words.momSays: Beige flag? Like a beige curtain?

words.definition: a warning sign about a person or situation. something that screams 'run' or 'proceed with extreme caution.'
words.example: he said 'I'm not like other guys' — the biggest red flag in the dating handbook 🚩
words.momSays: Red flag? Like at the beach? Is there a shark??

words.definition: a positive sign about a person. healthy behavior that makes you think 'okay, this one might be safe.'
words.example: he remembered my coffee order after hearing it once. GREEN FLAG 💚
words.momSays: Green flag? Like at a car race?

words.definition: subtly revealing a new relationship on social media without showing the person's face. just a hand, a silhouette, mystery.
words.example: she posted a hand on her knee in the car. the soft launch has commenced 👀
words.momSays: Soft launch? Like launching a boat gently?

words.definition: officially revealing your relationship on social media with full face, name, and no ambiguity. the opposite of soft launch.
words.example: she posted a carousel with 10 photos and tagged him. HARD LAUNCH. it's real. 💍
words.momSays: Hard launch? Sounds painful!

words.definition: the undefined pre-relationship phase where you're getting to know someone but nothing is official. emotional purgatory.
words.example: been in the talking stage for 4 months. at this point we're just pen pals with anxiety 📝
words.momSays: Talking stage? As opposed to the silent stage?

words.definition: removing someone from your life completely. no more access, no more chances. the bridge has been burned.
words.example: she liked my ex's photo so she's cut off. I don't make the rules actually I do 💅
words.momSays: Cut off? Like with scissors? What are you cutting?

words.definition: someone who goes out of their way to prove they're 'not like other people' to gain attention or validation from others.
words.example: 'I only hang out with guys, girls are so dramatic' — certified pick me behavior 🤡
words.momSays: Pick you? For what? A team? Sports?

words.definition: the idealized version of yourself. wakes up early, journals, has a skincare routine, drinks green smoothies. aspirational aesthetic.
words.example: woke up at 5am, went to the gym, meal prepped, AND journaled. I'm becoming that girl 🧘‍♀️
words.momSays: That girl? Which girl? Point her out to me!

words.definition: when you've consumed so much internet content that your brain is just memes, references, and zero substance.
words.example: I tried to write an essay but all I could think about was that one TikTok sound. brain rot is REAL.
words.momSays: Brain rot?? Do we need to see a doctor??

words.definition: the energy or vibe someone gives off. can be quantified in 'aura points' that you gain or lose based on your actions.
words.example: he tripped walking up to the podium to give his speech. -500 aura points 📉
words.momSays: Aura? Like the Northern Lights? Aurora Borealis?

words.definition: supposedly the rarest male personality type. a lone wolf who doesn't need validation. mostly used ironically now.
words.example: he ate lunch alone by choice, stared into the distance, and left. sigma grindset activated 🐺
words.momSays: Sigma? Like the math symbol? Are you doing homework?

words.definition: excessively complimenting or praising someone, especially when it's undeserved. professional meat riding.
words.example: 'omg you're LITERALLY the smartest person alive' bro stop glazing he just tied his shoes 🍩
words.momSays: Glazing? Like glazing a donut? I can teach you!

words.definition: when someone is completely done for, destroyed, or in an impossible situation. there's no recovery.
words.example: she pulled up his old tweets from 2016 in front of everyone. bro is COOKED 🍳
words.momSays: Cooked? Like dinner? Is it ready?

words.definition: acting crazy, bugging out, being extra. doing something that makes no sense. also means glitching.
words.example: she texted her ex at 3am and then threw her phone in the pool. she was TWEAKING fr
words.momSays: Tweaking? Like a tweak? Are you fixing something?

words.definition: when someone does something so impressive or makes a point so strong that you have to acknowledge their excellence.
words.example: he roasted the whole class in one sentence and the teacher laughed. nah he COOKED 🧑‍🍳🔥
words.momSays: Who's cooking? Is someone in the kitchen?

words.definition: making decisions based on what would make the best story later. embracing chaos for narrative purposes.
words.example: should I text my ex? absolutely not. but for the PLOT? it must be done. 🎬
words.momSays: Plot? Like a garden plot? We don't have a garden!

words.definition: to throw something with absolute violence and zero regard for where it lands. also an exclamation of power.
words.example: she yeeted her phone across the room after seeing her ex's story 📱💨
words.usageWarning: giving 2018 energy ⚠️ still valid as a verb tho
words.momSays: YEET? Like a beet? The vegetable?

words.definition: an affirmative response meaning 'okay' or 'sounds good.' short, cool, no explanation needed.
words.example: 'wanna grab food?' 'bet.' — the most efficient conversation in history
words.momSays: Bet? Are you gambling?? Don't gamble!

words.definition: short for 'fixing to' meaning 'about to' or 'going to.' southern roots, universal application.
words.example: I'm finna order the entire menu because I skipped lunch and my stomach is making threats
words.momSays: Finna? That's not a word! Use proper English!

words.definition: gossip, drama, or juicy information. spilling the tea = sharing gossip. sipping tea = minding your business while drama unfolds.
words.example: girl sit DOWN because the tea I'm about to spill is SCALDING hot ☕🔥
words.momSays: Tea? I'll put the kettle on! Earl Grey or chamomile?

words.definition: subtle disrespect or indirect insult. the art of being rude without being obvious about it.
words.example: she said 'oh you're so brave for wearing that' — the shade was immaculate 🌳
words.momSays: Shade? Do you need an umbrella? It's sunny out!

words.definition: a lie. to cap = to lie. that's cap = that's a lie. the opposite of no cap.
words.example: he said he can bench 300 pounds... that's cap and we all know it 🧢
words.momSays: Cap? Like a baseball cap? Here, wear this one!

words.definition: an era of embracing your unapologetic, messy, party-girl energy. inspired by Charli XCX. the opposite of clean girl aesthetic.
words.example: it's brat summer. I'm wearing lime green, going out every night, and having zero regrets 💚
words.momSays: Brat? I raised you better than that!

words.definition: a viral TikTok term/series about toilets. now used as a general nonsense modifier. if you understand it, you have brain rot.
words.example: he said 'skibidi' in a job interview and honestly I respect the commitment to chaos
words.usageWarning: you will lose aura points saying this unironically
words.momSays: Skip-a-dee? Like a dance move?

words.definition: an exclamation of shock/attraction, usually about someone's physical appearance. the spelling makes it funnier somehow.
words.example: she walked in and the whole room went GYATT. nobody was prepared 😳
words.usageWarning: use sparingly or you'll get side-eyed
words.momSays: GEE-YATT? Is that a sneeze? Bless you!

words.definition: a jaw exercise technique that became a meme. pressing your tongue to the roof of your mouth to supposedly improve your jawline.
words.example: he's been mewing for 3 months and his jawline is still giving rectangle 💀
words.momSays: Meowing? Like a cat? Are we getting a cat??

words.definition: mindful, cutesy, modest. went viral as a way to describe doing things in a subtle, elegant way. very demure, very mindful.
words.example: I caused a scene at Walmart but in a very demure, very mindful way 🎀
words.momSays: Demure! Now THAT'S a word I actually know!

words.definition: did something perfectly. consumed the competition. left nothing behind. similar to slay but edgier.
words.example: she ate that presentation. absolutely devoured it. the class was SHOOK.
words.momSays: Ate? Ate what? You already had dinner!

words.definition: acting with zero social filter or restraint. raw, unhinged behavior usually triggered by something exciting.
words.example: the concert tickets dropped and I went absolutely FERAL trying to check out 🐺
words.momSays: Feral? Like a feral cat? We need to call animal control!

words.definition: adding 'material' after something to say it DEFINES a certain quality. 'wife material' = worthy of being a wife.
words.example: she brought snacks to study group without anyone asking. wife material fr 💍
words.momSays: Material? Like fabric? What material? Cotton? Silk?

words.definition: the number of people someone has been intimate with. a controversial metric that gen z loves to debate about.
words.example: someone asked my body count at the dinner table. sir this is a Wendy's 😭
words.usageWarning: context VERY much matters with this one
words.momSays: Body count?! Like in a war movie?? How many??

words.definition: existing at peak happiness and fulfillment. not caring about others' opinions. main character energy activated.
words.example: quit my job, booked a solo trip, adopted a cat. living my best life fr 🌴
words.usageWarning: giving 2019 ⚠️ but the sentiment is eternal
words.momSays: Are you not always living your best life? I worry about you!

words.definition: shortened version of 'understood the assignment.' just one word that carries the weight of a full compliment.
words.example: the fit? understood. the hair? understood. the vibe? UNDERSTOOD. 😤💅
words.momSays: Understood what? I didn't say anything!

words.definition: just fax. meaning 'that's factual.' a gen z way of saying something is absolutely true.
words.example: she's the most talented person in this school, no printer just fax 🖨️
words.momSays: No printer? Did the printer break? I'll buy new ink!

words.definition: pointing out a specific thing about someone or something. can be complimentary or shady depending on the blank.
words.example: it's the confidence for me. she walked into the interview like she already had the job 💅
words.momSays: What's the what for you? Finish the sentence!

words.definition: an amplified version of yikes. when regular yikes doesn't capture the magnitude of how bad something is.
words.example: he proposed at his ex's wedding... big yikes from the entire congregation 😬
words.momSays: Big yikes? How is a yikes big?

words.definition: I understand completely, no further explanation needed. you had me before you even finished explaining.
words.example: 'wanna get boba?' 'SAY LESS I'm already in the car' 🧋
words.momSays: Say less? But I have more to say!

words.definition: (as in 'lives rent free') occupying mental space without permission. you can't evict the thought.
words.example: that cringy thing I said at the party in 2019 is still paying ZERO rent in my brain
words.momSays: Rent? Are you behind on rent?? Do you need money?

words.definition: someone or something that is chaotic, wild, and operating without any normal social filters. and we love it.
words.example: she replied to a work email with just '👁️👄👁️' — absolutely unhinged behavior and I stan
words.momSays: Unhinged? Like a door? We need to fix that!

words.definition: stealing something (usually from school) and showing it off on social media. originally a TikTok trend.
words.example: bro really stole the SOAP DISPENSER from the bathroom. the devious lick era was unhinged 🧼
words.momSays: Devious lick? Did you lick something? That's unsanitary!

words.definition: existing in a state of blissful ignorance. not overthinking, just feeling. brain is on vacation.
words.example: sitting on the beach watching the sunset — no thoughts just vibes 🌅✨
words.momSays: No thoughts? You should always be thinking!

words.definition: minding your own business while watching drama unfold. observing chaos without getting involved.
words.example: the group chat is fighting and I'm just here sipping tea watching it all burn ☕🐸
words.momSays: I'll make you tea! What kind do you want?

words.definition: being the absolute best at something specific. you own it. it's your brand now.
words.example: she's the CEO of arriving exactly 5 minutes late to everything. consistent queen.
words.momSays: CEO? You started a company?! Why didn't you tell me??

words.definition: a significant positive transformation in appearance, confidence, or life situation. the before and after that makes jaws DROP.
words.example: she disappeared for one summer and came back with a glow up that broke the internet 🦋
words.momSays: Glow up? Like a glow stick? Do you need batteries?

words.definition: accepted, respected, legitimate. your feelings, opinions, or choices are acknowledged and okay.
words.example: you don't like chocolate? weird but honestly? valid. everyone's got their thing.
words.momSays: Valid? Like a valid parking ticket?

words.definition: synonym for 'ate and left no crumbs.' someone performed exceptionally. they demolished it.
words.example: Beyoncé at the Super Bowl? SHE ATE THAT UP. not a single crumb was found. 🐝
words.momSays: Ate what up? There's still food on your plate!

words.definition: questioning your relationship with alcohol without fully committing to sobriety. just... exploring the concept.
words.example: I'm sober curious this month which means I'll have ONE drink instead of seven
words.momSays: Curious about soda? We have Pepsi in the fridge!

words.definition: short for 'it's giving.' describes the vibe or energy of something.
words.example: that outfit is giving CEO on vacation in Santorini 🏝️
words.momSays: Giving what? What are you giving? Is it a gift?

words.definition: to focus intensely and eliminate all distractions. it's grind time. no more playing around.
words.example: finals start Monday so I need to LOCK IN this weekend. phone going on airplane mode ✈️
words.momSays: Lock in? Lock what? The door?

words.definition: a quantified measure of someone's social perceived coolness that increases or decreases based on actions.
words.example: he caught a falling glass mid-air without looking. +1000 aura points 📈
words.momSays: Aura points? Is this a video game?

words.definition: used to describe something bizarre, cursed, or unsettling. 'only in Ohio' became a meme for weird content.
words.example: saw a raccoon riding a skateboard at 3am. THIS is why people say only in Ohio 🦝
words.momSays: Ohio? We don't live in Ohio! Are we moving?

words.definition: grasping the energy of a situation perfectly and matching it. social intelligence at its finest.
words.example: she walked into the party, read the room, and immediately understood the vibe
words.momSays: Vibe? Like vibrate? Is your phone on vibrate?

words.definition: being caught off guard, unprepared, or in a compromising/embarrassing situation.
words.example: showed up to class without doing the reading and got called on first. caught lackin fr 😭
words.momSays: Caught lacking? Lacking what? I'll get it for you!

words.definition: deeply relating to something someone said. it hit home. you didn't just hear it, you FELT it in your soul.
words.example: 'I'm tired of being tired' — I felt that on a spiritual level 😮‍💨
words.momSays: You felt what? Are you sick? Where does it hurt?

words.definition: telling someone they're just dealing with the fact that they're wrong by rationalizing it. denial, basically.
words.example: 'actually losing money on crypto is the REAL investment strategy' — bro that's COPE 🤡
words.momSays: Cope? Like coping? I cope with wine!

words.definition: to be quietly furious about something. the anger is simmering beneath the surface. closely related to cope.
words.example: he posted a thirst trap after the breakup and she is absolutely SEETHING about it 🫠
words.momSays: Seethe? Like a boiling pot? Are you cooking?

words.definition: to hype someone up, give them excessive compliments and encouragement. gassing them up.
words.example: my friends gassed me up so much before the date I walked in feeling like a CELEBRITY 👑
words.momSays: Gas? Do we need to fill up the car?

words.definition: something intentionally exaggerated, theatrical, and over-the-top in its aesthetic. embracing the extra.
words.example: that outfit is SO camp. the feathers, the sequins, the drama — absolutely everything 🦚
words.momSays: Camp? Like summer camp? Pack your sleeping bag!

words.definition: outdid everyone else in the game. particularly when a celebrity or person outshines their competition.
words.example: Rihanna at the Super Bowl literally ate the girls up while PREGNANT. goated behavior 🐐
words.momSays: Ate the girls? That sounds violent!

words.definition: having your social media accounts removed or suspended. digitally exiled from the internet.
words.example: he got deplatformed from everywhere simultaneously — man went from famous to invisible in 24 hours
words.momSays: De-platformed? Like falling off a platform?

words.definition: best friend, but also used loosely for anyone you vaguely like or are addressing in conversation.
words.example: bestie have you SEEN the new season?? we need to talk about episode 5 IMMEDIATELY
words.momSays: Bestie? Who's your best friend now? I thought I was!

words.definition: an assortment of random snacks assembled as a meal. no cooking, just vibes and cheese.
words.example: girl dinner tonight is: three crackers, some grapes, a pickle, and leftover halloween candy 🧀
words.momSays: That's not dinner! Let me cook you a proper meal!

words.definition: suspicious or suspect. when something or someone seems off. popularized by Among Us.
words.example: why did he switch his phone screen when I walked by? that's mad sus 🤨
words.momSays: SUSS? Is that a word? You're making up words again!

words.definition: something that's underrated or not getting the recognition it deserves. overlooked excellence.
words.example: that album is criminally SLEPT ON. not a single skip and nobody's talking about it 😤
words.momSays: Slept on? Like a bed? You can sleep on a bed!

words.definition: grasping the subtext of a social situation, especially when shade is being thrown.
words.example: she understood the read immediately and responded with twice the shade. queen behavior.
words.momSays: Read what? A book? Which one?
